title: Access dashboard after signing in and see main dashboard UI elements
description: Verifies a signed-in user can reach the protected dashboard and sees the expected header, welcome message, and placeholder stats.

steps.description: Complete the sign-in form using "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"

title: Create a new project successfully from the dashboard modal
description: Verifies a signed-in user can open the Create Project modal, submit valid details, and see the new project appear in the list.

steps.description: Complete the sign-in form using "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Verify element "Create Project" modal is visible
Type "E2E Test Project" into the project name field
Type "https://example.com" into the project URL field
Verify text "E2E Test Project" is visible

title: Project creation validation: missing project name shows error and does not create project
description: Verifies the modal validates required project name, keeps the modal open, and prevents project creation when name is empty.

steps.description: Complete the sign-in form using "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Verify element "Create Project" modal is visible
Type "https://example.com" into the project URL field
Verify element "Create Project" modal is visible

title: Dashboard shows Create Project entry point for signed-in users
description: Verifies the signed-in dashboard exposes the primary Create Project action to the user.

steps.description: Complete the sign-in form using "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
Verify element "Create Project" button is visible
Verify element "Create Project" modal is visible

title: Projects list area is visible on the dashboard after sign-in
description: Verifies the dashboard renders the projects section/list container for a signed-in user.

steps.description: Complete the sign-in form using "{{LOGIN_USER}}" and "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}"
